metadata.description: Standalone PRP engineering toolkit: a self-contained prp-plan / prp-implement / prp-loop workflow with Serena LSP codebase search, cross-session memory keyed by Jira ticket + branch, Jira context injection, and a personal knowledge base.

plugins.name: codebase-intelligence
plugins.description: Standalone PRP workflow — prp-plan / prp-implement / prp-loop — with Serena LSP structural codebase search, cross-session memory, Jira context injection, a personal KB (bookrag), and a bounded closed-loop runner with contract-mandated stop rules and an independent verifier. No prp-core required.
